patterns_discovered: Systematic test data generation with consistent, deterministic test IDs
Comprehensive seeding functions for multiple database entities
Strong typing using TypeScript for seed data generation
Modular approach to creating test data with separate seed functions per entity type
Use of mock data with realistic scenarios across different domains

Need to manage relationships between different entities during seeding
Ensuring deterministic IDs for consistent test reproducibility

Implemented fixed test IDs for consistent testing
Generated mock data across multiple entities

recommendations: Consider extracting common seed data generation logic into a shared utility

Implement optional randomization for test data to increase test coverage
